message.content:
Explore this codebase to understand:
1. The overall project structure (framework, key directories)
2. Where user data is fetched from Supabase
3. Where user profile names are displayed (components that show usernames)
4. Any existing badge or icon system
5. The styling approach used (CSS modules, Tailwind, styled-components, etc.)

Be very thorough - check all components, pages, and data fetching logic. Report back file paths and relevant code snippets.

content.text: I'll conduct a thorough exploration of the codebase. Let me start by examining the overall structure and understanding the project.

content.text: Now let me look at the key files for understanding Supabase integration, user data fetching, and styling:

content.content:
1→import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
     2→
     3→const supabase = createClient(
     4→    import.meta.env.VITE_SUPABASE_URL,
     5→    import.meta.env.VITE_SUPABASE_API_KEY
     6→)
     7→export default supabase;

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the codebase. Let me compile my findings: ## Comprehensive Codebase Exploration Report ### 1. Overall Project Structure **Framework & Architecture:** - **Frontend Framework**: React 19 with Vite (v7.1.7) - **Styling**: CSS Modules (separate .css files per component) - **State Management**: TanStack React Query v5 (for server state) + React Context API (for auth/theme) - **UI/Animation**: Framer Motion (v12.23.23) for animations - **Editor**: Lexical (v0.17.0) for rich text editing - **Backend**: Express.js server with Supabase for database/auth - **Additional**: React Router v7, React Spinners for loading indicators **Directory Structure:** - `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client/` - Frontend (React/Vite) - `src/components/` - React components organized by feature - `src/Context/` - Auth and Theme context providers - `src/utils/` - Utility functions and custom hooks - `API/` - API service layer - `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\server/` - Backend (Express.js) - `controller/` - Route controllers - `services/` - Business logic services - `routes/routes.js` - API endpoint definitions --- ### 2. User Data Fetching from Supabase **Supabase Client:** - **File**: `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\utils\supabaseClient.js` - Simple wrapper using `@supabase/supabase-js` library - Credentials from environment variables: `VITE_SUPABASE_URL`, `VITE_SUPABASE_API_KEY` **User Data Fetching Flow:** 1. **Auth Context** (`C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\Context\Authcontext.jsx`): - Uses `supabase.auth.getSession()` to get user authentication session - Uses React Query to fetch user data via `getUserData(userId)` API call - Listens to real-time auth state changes with `supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange()` - Real-time notification channel subscription for new notifications 2. **User Data Service** (`C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\server\services\getUserDataService.js`): - Fetches user profile data from `users` table - Fetches follower count from `follows` table (WHERE `following_id=userId`) - Fetches following count from `follows` table (WHERE `follower_id=userId`) - Executes all three queries in parallel with Promise.all() - Returns: `{userData: array, followerCount: number, followingCount: number}` 3. **User Data API Endpoint**: - **Route**: `/getUserData?userId={userId}` - **Controller**: `getUserDataController` in `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\server\controller\getUserDataController.js` - Returns user profile data with follower/following counts --- ### 3. User Profile Names Display Components **Profile Name Display Locations:** 1. **My Profile Page** (`C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\ProfilePage\MyProfile.jsx`): - Line 625: `

{userData?.name}

` - Line 626: `

{userData?.user_email}

` - User data comes from `user?.userData?.[0]` (first element from userData array) - User email and name displayed in profile hero section 2. **Visited Profile** (`C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\VisitProfile\VisitProfile.jsx`): - Line 235: `

{userData?.name}

` - Shows visited user's name with follow/unfollow button - Displays follower/following counts from `followsData` 3. **Post Cards / News Feed** (`C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\HomePage\postCards\PostCards.jsx`): - Line 314: `

{journal.users.name}

` - Line 322: `

{journal.users.user_email}

` - User data comes from nested journal object: `journal.users.name`, `journal.users.image_url`, `journal.users.user_email` - User avatar shown as 24x24px circular image (line 310-311) - Clickable username with hover underline effect 4. **Sidebar User Info** (`C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\SideBar\Sidebar.jsx`): - Displays current logged-in user's name and email - Profile avatar (32x32px) **Key User Data Fields Accessible:** - `name` - User display name - `user_email` - User email address - `image_url` - Avatar/profile picture URL - `bio` - User biography - `profile_font_color` - Custom text color on profile - `background` - Profile background style - `created_at` - Account creation date - `id` - User unique ID --- ### 4. Existing Badge or Icon System **Badge System:** 1. **Notification Count Badge** (`C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\SideBar\sidebar.css`, lines 141-156): ```css .notification-count{ background-color: rgb(255, 42, 42); /* Red badge */ position: absolute; left: 18px; bottom: 18px; font-size: 0.65rem; border-radius: 50%; width: 10px; height: 10px; padding: 0.25rem; } ``` - Small red circular badge showing notification count - Positioned absolutely on top-right of notification icon - Used in sidebar navigation (`MyProfile.jsx`, line 99) 2. **Icon System - Card Action Icons** (`C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\HomePage\postCards\PostCards.jsx`, lines 73-125): - **Like Icon**: SVG with conditional color change - Gray when not liked: `fill="#5e5e5eff"` - Red when liked: `fill="rgb(255, 116, 116)"` - Located at lines 75-84 - **Comment Icon**: SVG icon - Fixed gray color: `fill="#5e5e5eff"` - Located at lines 91-98 - **Bookmark Icon**: SVG with conditional color - Gray when not bookmarked: `fill="#5e5e5eff"` - Green when bookmarked: `fill="rgb(72, 208, 135)"` - Located at lines 104-111 - **View Icon**: Eye icon showing view count - Semi-transparent gray: `fill="var(--icon-view)"` - Located at lines 118-122 3. **Notification Count Display** (`C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\HomePage\home.jsx`, line 79): - Shows notification count in sidebar link: `notifCount: notifCount > 0 ? notifCount : ''` --- ### 5. Styling Approach **CSS System: CSS Modules with CSS Variables** **Color Design System** (`C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\index.css`): Light Mode (Default): ```css --bg-primary: #ffffff --bg-secondary: rgb(250, 250, 250) --bg-hover: rgb(245, 245, 245) --bg-elevated: rgb(255, 255, 255) --bg-backdrop: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.23) --bg-backdrop-heavy: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.575) --text-primary: rgb(4, 20, 29) --text-secondary: rgb(75, 75, 75) --text-muted: rgb(130, 130, 130) --text-faint: rgb(150, 150, 150) --accent-purple: rgb(94, 66, 255) --accent-dark: rgb(4, 20, 29) --accent-dark-hover: rgb(16, 56, 79) ``` Dark Mode (data-theme="dark"): ```css --bg-primary: rgb(18, 18, 18) --bg-secondary: rgb(24, 24, 24) --text-primary: rgb(225, 225, 225) --accent-purple: rgb(140, 120, 255) ``` **Typography:** - Default Font: "Nunito" (sans-serif) - Headings: "Lexend Deca" or "Franklin Gothic Medium" - Editor: Lexical theme with custom classes **Component Styling:** - Each component has its own `.css` file (e.g., `postcards.css`, `myprofile.css`, `sidebar.css`) - Uses standard CSS with no Tailwind or styled-components - Flexbox layout system - CSS variables for theming support **Key Styling Features:** 1. **Profile Cards** (`postcards.css`): - Card hover effect: `background-color: var(--bg-hover)` - User avatar: 24px circular with border-radius: 50% - Username: 0.8rem font size, 650 weight, hoverable with underline 2. **Sidebar** (`sidebar.css`): - Link hover with background color transition - Active state indicator - User avatar: 32px circular - Notification badge: 10px red circle 3. **Profile Page** (`myprofile.css`): - Profile background support (gradient or image) - Custom font color picker for profile text - Hero section with avatar ring - Stats display (followers/following) 4. **Animations**: - Framer Motion for component transitions - Modal animations: scale + opacity - Page transitions: fade effects - Smooth loading state indicators **Responsive Design:** - Mobile-first approach with breakpoints - Mobile navbar/sidebar separate components - Responsive layout for different screen sizes --- ### Key File Locations Summary: **Critical User Data Files:** - `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\Context\Authcontext.jsx` - User auth & data context - `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\server\services\getUserDataService.js` - User data fetching - `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\API\Api.js` - API client functions - `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\utils\supabaseClient.js` - Supabase setup **Profile Display Files:** - `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\ProfilePage\MyProfile.jsx` - My profile - `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\VisitProfile\VisitProfile.jsx` - Other user profiles - `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\HomePage\postCards\PostCards.jsx` - News feed **Styling Root Files:** - `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\index.css` - CSS variables & theme - `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\App.css` - App-level styles - Individual component `.css` files for scoped styling
